{{Quote|The CIS has received credits for defending our D-1600 fleet.|Anonymous [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-Series battle droid]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Battlefront II" />}}
The '''D-1600 fleet''' was a [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] that was part of the [[Confederate Navy/Legends|navy]] of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|CIS]] fighting in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. It included at least three large [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]] as well as several [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]], berthed in the fleet's main vessels.

==Order of battle==
===Main force===
Although the [[Lucrehulk-class battleship/Legends|''Lucrehulk''-class battleships]] rarely engaged in battle, the [[Providence-class carrier/destroyer/Legends|''Providence''-class carrier/destroyers]] served as capital ships and the [[Munificent-class star frigate/Legends|''Munificent''-class star frigates]] served as the main frigates.<ref name="Star Wars: Battlefront II" />

===Support ships===
Some of the smaller fighters of the fleet included [[Vulture-class starfighter/Legends|Vulture droids]], serving mainly as the basic fighters. [[Droid tri-fighter/Legends|Droid tri-fighters]] were the faster, more maneuverable ships. Lastly, the [[Belbullab-24 strike bomber]] was the main bombing ship. The fleet also included several [[HMP droid gunship/Legends|droid gunships]], used as landing craft to heavily cripple enemy fleets.<ref name="Star Wars: Battlefront II" />

==Crew==
The fleet carried a force of [[droid marine]]s and [[OOM pilot battle droid/Legends|droid pilots]]. Marines often used droid gunships to board enemy [[Venator-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Venator''-class Star Destroyers]].<ref name="Star Wars: Battlefront II" />

==Behind the scenes==
In ''Star Wars: Battlefront II'', the Lucrehulk-class battleships are never in the playable area.<ref name="Star Wars: Battlefront II" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Battlefront II]]'' {{1st}}
